entries.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
entries.description: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

entries.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
entries.description: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

entries.title: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
entries.description: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

entries.title: Who trusts Sam Altman?
entries.description: "I believe I am an honest and trustworthy businessperson," Altman testified in federal court.

entries.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
entries.description: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.

entries.title: Introducing the 6 stages at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 — built for today’s tougher startup market

entries.title: WhatsApp adds an incognito mode in Meta AI chats
entries.description: Meta said these incognito conversations are not saved, and messages will disappear by default once you close the chat.

entries.title: Anthropic now has more business customers than OpenAI, according to Ramp data
entries.description: A survey compiled from fintech firm Ramp’s clients’ expense data shows 34.4% of participating businesses are paying for Anthropic services, more than any other AI lab, while only 32.3% pay for OpenAI.

entries.title: Poppy debuts a proactive AI assistant to help organize your digital life
entries.description: Poppy is an AI-powered app that connects your calendar, email, messages, and other services to surface reminders, suggestions, and tasks based on what’s happening in your life.

entries.title: Adaption aims big with AutoScientist, an AI tool that helps models train themselves
entries.description: Adaption's new AutoScientist tool is designed to let models adapt to specific capabilities quickly through an automated approach to conventional fine-tuning.

entries.title: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea

entries.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
entries.description: "Any sale or transfer of Anthropic stock, or any interest in Anthropic stock, offered by these firms is void and will not be recognized on our books and records," the company's support page reads.

entries.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
entries.description: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

entries.title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
entries.description: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

entries.title: Google adds Gemini-powered dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dictation startups
entries.description: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones.

entries.description: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers."

entries.description: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.
